emails.subject: Staffing issues
emails.body: Staffing issues I have some ideas, if you want to hear them, about Susan and what I would like out of the eastern rockies assistant trader/cash trader. I can e-mail you my thoughts or we can talk about them or both. Let me know when you want to talk about this. Jay

emails.subject: RE: Staffing issues
emails.body: RE: Staffing issues Sure. 12:15? To: Grigsby, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Staffing issues
emails.body: That will work just fine. To: Reitmeyer, Jay
